prompt.content: Triangle A is transformed to Triangle B. Which sequence of transformations maps Triangle A onto Triangle B?

<svg viewBox='0 0 320 220' role='img' aria-label='Triangle A translated right and reflected across the x-axis to form Triangle B'><line x1='20' y1='110' x2='300' y2='110' stroke='gray' stroke-width='2'/><text x='286' y='104' font-size='14'>x-axis</text><polygon points='50,70 90,70 65,35' fill='none' stroke='black' stroke-width='3'/><text x='58' y='28' font-size='15'>A</text><polygon points='190,150 230,150 205,185' fill='none' stroke='black' stroke-width='3'/><text x='198' y='205' font-size='15'>B</text><line x1='50' y1='70' x2='150' y2='70' stroke='lightgray' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='5 5'/><polygon points='150,70 190,70 165,35' fill='none' stroke='lightgray' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='5 5'/><text x='144' y='28' font-size='13' fill='gray'>after translation</text></svg>

choices.content: Translate Triangle A to the right, then reflect it across the x-axis.
Reflect Triangle A across the x-axis, then translate it to the left.
Rotate Triangle A 90° clockwise about the origin.
Translate Triangle A straight down only.

steps.content: The dashed triangle shows Triangle A after it is translated to the right. Reflecting that translated triangle across the x-axis places it on Triangle B.
